title: Adherence Exception Guide
text: Adherence exceptions must include date, interval, reason code, and supervisor review note.

title: SLA Escalation Playbook
text: When SLA is below target for two intervals, analysts compare forecast variance, occupancy, shrinkage, and backlog.

title: Bilingual Support Quality
text: Bilingual responses should preserve meaning, tone, and compliance language in both English and Spanish.

title: Synthetic Data Policy
text: Public portfolio projects must use synthetic data and avoid employer, customer, student, credential, and health records.

title: Forecast Review Notes
text: Forecast review compares actual contacts against expected contacts and documents known events or staffing gaps.

title: AI Evaluation Workflow
text: Prompt evaluators score helpfulness, accuracy, safety, clarity, and language quality using consistent rubrics.
